name: io.github.alanzha2/observe-instrument-mcp
description: Add OpenTelemetry tracing to Python AI agents. Supports LangGraph, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, OpenAI SDK.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Anthropic Claude (default LLM provider)

environmentVariables.name: LLM_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: LLM model to use (default: claude-sonnet-4-6). Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Groq, Ollama via LiteLLM.

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Google Gemini models
